subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: The ancient philosophers of Greece, Persia, and Egypt believed that God manifested in material things His final and supreme Reality.
subcodes.subjects: @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization
